results.rendered_html:
anadhyakṣa a. [na. ta.]
1 Not perceptible or observable, invisible; mano'pi na tathājñānādanadhyakṣaṃ tadā bhavet .  Bhāṣā P. 
2 Without controller or ruler &c.
